action.reasoning: Observation: iteration 8 LightGBM LGBMRanker failed because labels are continuous floats, but lambdarank expects integer labels. Analysis: need to discretize daily returns into ordinal ranks (e.g., deciles) to use lambdarank, while evaluating IC on original continuous returns. Decision: modify train.py to discretize labels per day, train LGBMRanker, custom IC metric on continuous validation labels. Adjust predict.py for new model. Submit eval for baseline IC.
